Everything you need to track loans

Loan Register

Track every rupee you lend — principal, interest rate, due date, all in one place.

Payment Tracking

Record each payment and watch the outstanding balance update automatically.

Status at a Glance

Know instantly which loans are active, overdue, or fully paid.

Keep your loans to friends and family private and secure with Loan Khatam.

Frequently asked questions

Everything about tracking personal loans and udhaar with Loan Khatam.

What is Loan Khatam?

Loan Khatam is a free personal loan and udhaar tracker. It helps you record money you lend to friends, family, or colleagues, track repayments and EMIs, and see outstanding balances at a glance — all in Indian Rupees (₹).

How do I keep track of money I lend to friends and family?

Add each loan with the borrower's name, amount, interest rate, and due date. Every time you receive a repayment, record it and Loan Khatam updates the outstanding balance automatically, so you always know who owes you how much.

Is Loan Khatam free to use?

Yes. Loan Khatam is completely free to sign up and use for tracking your personal loans and udhaar.

Can I track informal udhaar and EMI-based loans?

Absolutely. You can track both casual udhaar between friends and structured loans with interest and monthly EMIs. The app calculates balances, due dates, and overdue status for you.

Is my financial data private and secure?

Yes. Your account is protected with secure sign-in, and your loan records stay private to you — only you can see the money you have lent and the repayments you record.

Can I use Loan Khatam on my phone?

Yes. Loan Khatam works in any mobile browser and is also available as an Android app, so you can update your loan khata anytime, anywhere.

Ready to start?

Create your Loan Khatam account in seconds. No complexity, just clarity.
